# React Native Login App

This is a simple React Native app created with Expo that features:
- Login screen with username/password authentication
- Navigation between screens
- Mobile-friendly design for testing on phones via Expo Go

## Project Structure
- App.js - Main app component with navigation
- screens/ - Contains all screen components
- components/ - Reusable components

## Development
- Run `npm start` or `expo start` to start the development server
- Use Expo Go app on your phone to scan the QR code and test the app
